'''Nin''' was an old [[Senali (species)|Senali]] who worked for the [[Senali Royal Family]] as their assistant. She cooked and took care of [[Bu]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
